title: Critical System Update Available
description:
A new software update is available for your phone
Version: WTCELERO5G_1.18.39
Install time: 10-15 minutes

This release includes:
1. Disabled Carrier Video Calling feature for TMO MVNO SIM
2. Updated Preloaded Contact for TSA and TMO MVNO SIM
3. Optimized VVM
Warnings:
1. Please do not turn off your device while the update is being installed.
2. Please keep an active internet connection, and Wi-Fi is recommended in order to avoid cellular data charges.
3. Please ensure battery level at 40% or more, connected to the charger is recommended during the update.
4. This update will not erase your data, but it is recommended to backup your data.
5. It is suggested to not use the device during the update to avoid potential failures.
